title: Bolsius - Merry Moments - Burn time of 100 Hours - Natural extracts – Contains Vegan Wax – Palm Oil-Free
features: Create a warm and cosy atmosphere with Bolsius Merry Moments scented candle and fill ythehome with the comforting essence of cinnamon, ginger and baked apple, this product is made without palm oil and with plant-based wax, the Merry Moments collection includes candles in various sizes, reed diffusers and tealights

Radiant fruity apple and orange topnotes lead to the heart of home bakeries, red apples, ginger and cinnamon sticks, with rich vanilla and warm woody notes in the background, popping up nostalgic memories of christmas with family at home

The natural extracts infused within the Bolsius true glow scented candle emit a cosy and aromatic fragrance of warm spices, made more sustainable thanks to the use of natural vegan wax, this product is palm oil and animal fat free, the specific method used to braid the cotton wick creates a stable flame without smoke, the fragrances from Bolsius scented candles last for an impressively long time

The true glow collection is inspired by the colours and textures of the winter season, true glow combines classic, dark, woody fragrances with a bit of warm amber, the ideal fragrance for winter days which you can use to create a nice and welcoming, homely feeling

Place the product in a place where the fragrance can spread well, but away from combustible materials and out of direct sunlight, you can use a candle snuffer to avoid splashing, did you know that ythenose can get used to a certain fragrance and that you can no longer smell it yourself over time, it's therefore a good idea to switch fragrances regularly in ythehome so that you can continue to enjoy them at their best
description: Product Description Create a warm and cosy atmosphere with Bolsius Merry Moments scented candle and fill your home with the comforting essence of cinnamon, ginger and baked apple. This product is made without palm oil and with plant-based wax. The Merry Moments collection includes candles in various sizes, reed diffusers and tealights. Safety Warning Place the product in a place where the fragrance can spread well, but away from combustible materials and out of direct sunlight. You can use a candle snuffer to avoid splashing. Did you know that your nose can get used to a certain fragrance and that you can no longer smell it yourself over time? It's therefore a good idea to switch fragrances regularly in your home so that you can continue to enjoy them at their best.
